ai_role: EDA software, IP, verification, and chip design workflow
tvs_tiebreaker: EDA chokepoint durability can support core infrastructure status even if near-term growth is less explosive than accelerators.
technical_timing_rule: Technicals guide add pacing; valuation discipline matters because EDA quality is usually well recognized.
rationale: Synopsys is embedded in advanced chip design and verification workflows. Switching costs and mission-critical design tools create durable value capture.
